Either this parameter or the `verification_sid` must be specified. Phone numbers must be in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164). * @param string $verificationSid A SID that uniquely identifies the Verification Check. Either this parameter or the `to` phone number/[email](https://www.twilio.com/docs/verify/email) must be specified. * @param string $amount The amount of the associated PSD2 compliant transaction. Requires the PSD2 Service flag enabled. * @param string $payee The payee of the associated PSD2 compliant transaction.
